subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed souls! The letter ye had written to Rahmatu'llah hath been perused. Many and various were the joyful tidings it conveyed
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه نامه ای که بجناب رحمت الله مرقوم شده بود ملاحظه گردید مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement
